name: asia_london_range_break_xau
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) expands out of the Asian accumulation range (00:00-06:00 UTC) when the range is ATR-normal (0.5-2.0x ATR). A body-confirmed close beyond the range produces asymmetric continuation for 1-3 hours.

rules: LONG: close > asia_high + 0.5*ATR14 AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR14 within first 24 bars of London window

exit.time_stop: close after 36 M5 bars (~3h) or at 15:00 UTC, whichever first
exit.breakeven: move SL to entry after +1.0*ATR14 favorable
